topics.title: Satellite Radio Growth and Upcoming Roast
topics.summary: The studio discusses the upcoming roast of Artie Lange, recent satellite radio market trends favoring Sirius, and various observations on pop culture and television.

topics.title: Radio Industry News and Pop Culture Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses radio personality contract statuses, potential fines for indecency, the record-breaking popularity of Shakira's music, and various celebrity news stories including a three-armed baby and high-priced celebrity photos.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Satellite Radio Trends
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news regarding a new baby, reports on superstitious beliefs surrounding birth dates, and explores the impact of Howard Stern's move to satellite radio.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Merger Prospects
topics.summary: The show examines the potential merger of Sirius and XM, discussing market conditions, historical precedents for consolidation, and the management strengths of both companies.

topics.title: David Lee Roth Interview and Roast Preparation
topics.summary: The show features an interview with David Lee Roth regarding his career, contract disputes with CBS, and potential band reunions before transitioning into a segment on upcoming roast preparations.

topics.title: Eric the Midget Balloon Stunt Plans
topics.summary: The studio discusses logistics for an upcoming roast and a planned stunt involving floating Eric the Midget using weather balloons while debating whether he should be in a chair or wearing a cape.

topics.title: Proposed Balloon Flight for Eric
topics.summary: The studio discusses a proposal to float Eric on a weather balloon as part of a planned segment involving guest Catherine McPhee.

topics.title: Man Claiming to be Jesus Breaks into Reagan
topics.summary: The studio hosts a caller who identifies as Jesus and describes his 1980s break-in at the residence of Ronald Reagan.

topics.title: Antichrist Beliefs and Mental Health
topics.summary: The studio features a man who identifies as Jesus and discusses his beliefs regarding the Antichrist, his past legal issues for threatening the president, and his current life under home monitoring.

topics.title: Misty and Janice Dickinson Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a heated segment featuring Misty, who discusses her life as a sex worker and mother, followed by an appearance from model Janice Dickinson.

topics.title: Misty and Janice Dickinson Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange between Misty and Janice Dickinson regarding parenting, personal lifestyles, and past interactions with the host.

topics.title: Janice Dickinson Discusses Modeling and Celebrity Encounters
topics.summary: The studio features Janice Dickinson discussing her new modeling show, her upcoming book about celebrity dating, and various personal encounters with figures like Bill Cosby and Kelly LeBrock.

topics.title: Janice Dickinson Interview
topics.summary: The show features supermodel Janice Dickinson discussing her career, past experiences with celebrities like Grace Jones and Dolph Lundgren, and her personal history.

topics.title: Caller Game and Newsroom Conflict
topics.summary: The show features a listener participating in a "what's older" trivia game before transitioning to a discussion regarding a workplace dispute involving a news reporter, a prankster named Sal, and the history of various products.

topics.title: Medical Experiences and Family Caregiving
topics.summary: The studio explores a nurse's professional experiences with patient care, including an anecdote about a man with a missing limb, and a guest shares the personal challenges of caring for a quadriplegic father.

topics.title: Personal Anecdotes and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding personal family stories involving medical care and death, followed by commentary on celebrity news including David Copperfield's stunts and Patrick Kennedy's public statements.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including the legal status of same-sex marriage, celebrity news regarding Angelina Jolie and Rob Zombie, and updates on local comedy shows.
